title: thymus sibthorpii var. korthiaticus
intro: Thymus sibthorpii var. korthiaticus, also known as Korthals' thyme, is a lesser-known variety of the thyme plant species Thymus sibthorpii, which is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Korthals' thyme include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, and boost the immune system. Korthals' thyme can be prepared as a tea, essential oil, or dried herb for use in various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and topical applications.
